TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Matt_Adler, title = Matt_Adler, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Matt_Adler} }

S.FORM: Matt Adler kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 12, Matt Adler, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Matt Adler kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 12, Matt Adler, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: matt a*ler kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, matt a*ler, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
